_comment: Single source of truth for the ERAC Lite CRM Dataverse environment. Update OrgUrl + EnvironmentId when redeploying. SolutionId is written by Deploy-EracToNewEnv.ps1 after solution is created/located.

PreviousDeployment.Note: Master CE Mfg env was disabled — solution and all data inaccessible.

AbandonedDeployment.Note: Contoso default — bootstrapped publisher+solution but user lacked metadata-write privileges (1714/6043). Abandoned in favor of Mfg Gold Template.
